Looking over racks of cards and boards at Computex occasionally nets you a mystery like this.
Remember the good old days when SiS (TPE:2363) was designing competing chipsets for various x86-platforms and were involved in all sorts of litigation?
Computex 2010: There is a fifth too.......
Remember when we said there was a fourth WARM partner yesterday?
It looks like Bulldozer and Ivy Bridge, the next generation AMD and Intel CPUs, are both delayed.
Smart enough to run both Linux and Android.

Shipping & Handling at Replacements, Ltd. | Replacements, Ltd.
Standard shipping includes Alaska, Hawaii, Guam, Puerto Rico, and US Virgin Islands.
Express & Priority shipping is not available for PO Box, APO or FPO shipping addresses.
Express shipping is not available to Alaska, Hawaii, Guam, Puerto Rico, or U.S. Virgin Islands.
Due to high demand, standard shipping delivery for silver "hand-crafted" pieces is 10-14 business days.
Additional shipping charges will apply to oversized merchandise or large volume orders; we will provide you a shipping quote for approval prior to fulfillment. Multiple orders will be combined.
Click here to learn more about our Shipping & Handling.
We cannot ship to PO Boxes in Canada. Rates for Canadian orders include brokerage charges, taxes, and duties.
Delivery days from the ship date depend on customs clearance; as a result, we are unable to guarantee delivery times for Canadian Standard, Canadian Air Economy or Canadian Priority orders.
The following chart shows the standard shipping rates for international orders (other than those to Canada).
Shipping and handling charges include international brokerage charges; however, our charges for international orders do not include taxes, duties, advancements or other fees. These taxes and fees are the sole responsibility of the recipient.
Delivery times may vary depending on carrier and destination country. Various carriers and/or destination countries prohibit or limit international shipping; in such cases, orders cannot be placed or fulfilled.
